Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Sep-12-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. PLAINTIFF PALISADES COLLECTION LLC'S Hearing On Claim Of Exemption IS OFF CALENDAR. MOTION TO BE RENOTICED IN THE DISCOVERY DEPARTMENT. (301/PJB) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 8189

Claim Of Exemption (Moving Paper Is For #301 At 9:30 Am)
Off Calendar Sep-12-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Elizabeth A. MacDonald, Esquire (922-5939) on behalf of the Plaintiff/moving party and Jose Cerna, Defendant, in pro per (360-4659).

Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Judgment Debtor's Claim of Exemption is granted, except for $175 per pay period. The funds being held shall be released to the Judgment Creditor for payment on the judgment.
COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT (612)
